label: Reltio for Retail MDM
description: Base L3 configuration for the Retail industry vertical. Masters the retail customer (Individual, Household), the party spine (Organization, Location), loyalty programs, the store network, the GS1-aligned product master, the supplier master, and regulatory documents. Grounded in retail tenant analysis and aligned to common retail industry data models. Current release: retailmdm.0.1.0
